reference: I personally am not in favor of sclerotherapy. You have not mentioned the exact location of the seroma; still, in my opinion, surgical excision followed by chemotherapy is a better option, and if required, a revision hip replacement.
text: I personally am not in favor of sclerotherapy. You have not mentioned the exact location of the seroma. Still, in my opinion, surgical excision followed by chemotherapy is a better option, and if required, a revision hip replacement.
